channel.title: GameMaps L4D2 Files
channel.description: RSS feed for GameMaps L4D2 Files.

item.title: [ Mod ] remastered survivor
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
español - hola gente todo bien este es el mod que subo en gamemaps el mod no es mio si no del Spicy_Jam e visto que no hay este mods en gamemaps entoces por eso lo subo y solo seria eso autor Spicy_Jam - https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198305695766 nick - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3272324208 rochelle - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3245988041 coach - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3160038680 ellis - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3205379364 English - Hello everyone, how are you? This is the mod I'm uploading to Gamemaps. The mod isn't mine; it belongs to Spicy_Jam. I noticed that this mod isn't on Gamemaps, so I'm uploading it. That's all. author Spicy_Jam - https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198305695766 nick - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3272324208 rochelle - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3245988041 coach - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3160038680 ellis - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3205379364

That's all. author Spicy_Jam - https://steamcommunity.com/profiles/76561198305695766 nick - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3272324208 rochelle - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3245988041 coach - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3160038680 ellis - https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3205379364

item.title: [ 5 Maps ] Prodeus Requiem
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
A 5 maps coop/vs campaign set in a fictional europe country My venture to create pretty scenery that arent often seen in L4D2 campaigns continues There is a great trade-off to this, as fog level are set to very low, stuff visually fading in is seen very often Map 1 - Aleph: The survivors arrives at the festival, but the place has already been overrun with zombies. Map 2 - Ascension: Map by Henrietta. I finally manage to coax him into suffering with Hammer. Map is set in an underground facility (his favourite) Map 3 - Immortal Garden: Park-mall setting. Careful breaking glass will trigger alarm. Map 4 - Night at the Museum: A museum featuring Greek artifacts and a certain group of anime girls. Map 5 - Steel Ball Run: A chaotic finale featuring 2 new special infected both of which were made of metal and capable of insta-cap a survivor. Player and restore health by eating at the Gehenna Diner with replenishing foods. Deliver a gnome to the Shupogaki for bonus rewards. [h1]Feature:[/h1] [h2]Custom melee weapon - Kopis sword[/h2] This is the sword wielded by King Leonidas in the movie 300, using the same anim set as Vox's Khopesh sword, as it were many's favourites. [img]https://i.ibb.co/pvRx3qHk/kopis.png[/img][img]https://i.ibb.co/ZzwB22xg/kopiss.png[/img] [h2]Custom melee weapon - Spartan spear[/h2] Kratos's spartan spear from the game GoW: Ghost of Sparta. Has ability to throw and insta-killing infected (Hold RELOAD and press ATTACK to throw) [img]https://i.ibb.co/7dkqzQqV/spear.png[/img] [h2]Foods[/h2] Edible food are placed around the map. Give 8 health when eat. [img]https://i.ibb.co/0jTGDgrd/cbread.png[/img][img]https://i.ibb.co/gFgMJj51/burger.png[/img][img]https://i.ibb.co/jvrP4qFj/pretzel.png[/img] [h1]Stats:[/h1] Difficulty rating: MEDIUM Average COOP playtime: 60 minutes (no restart). Playable in Versus mode. Please report any bug you find Map name in the console: requiem_01 requiem_02 requiem_03 requiem_04 requiem_05 [h1]Optio
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
A 5 maps coop/vs campaign set in a fictional europe country My venture to create pretty scenery that arent often seen in L4D2 campaigns continues There is a great trade-off to this, as fog level are set to very low, stuff visually fading in is seen very often Map 1 - Aleph: The survivors arrives at the festival, but the place has already been overrun with zombies. Map 2 - Ascension: Map by Henrietta. I finally manage to coax him into suffering with Hammer. Map is set in an underground facility (his favourite) Map 3 - Immortal Garden: Park-mall setting. Careful breaking glass will trigger alarm. Map 4 - Night at the Museum: A museum featuring Greek artifacts and a certain group of anime girls. Map 5 - Steel Ball Run: A chaotic finale featuring 2 new special infected both of which were made of metal and capable of insta-cap a survivor. Player and restore health by eating at the Gehenna Diner with replenishing foods. Deliver a gnome to the Shupogaki for bonus rewards. [h1]Feature:[/h1] [h2]Custom melee weapon - Kopis sword[/h2] This is the sword wielded by King Leonidas in the movie 300, using the same anim set as Vox's Khopesh sword, as it were many's favourites. [img]https://i.ibb.co/pvRx3qHk/kopis.png[/img][img]https://i.ibb.co/ZzwB22xg/kopiss.png[/img] [h2]Custom melee weapon - Spartan spear[/h2] Kratos's spartan spear from the game GoW: Ghost of Sparta. Has ability to throw and insta-killing infected (Hold RELOAD and press ATTACK to throw) [img]https://i.ibb.co/7dkqzQqV/spear.png[/img] [h2]Foods[/h2] Edible food are placed around the map. Give 8 health when eat. [img]https://i.ibb.co/0jTGDgrd/cbread.png[/img][img]https://i.ibb.co/gFgMJj51/burger.png[/img][img]https://i.ibb.co/jvrP4qFj/pretzel.png[/img] [h1]Stats:[/h1] Difficulty rating: MEDIUM Average COOP playtime: 60 minutes (no restart). Playable in Versus mode. Please report any bug you find Map name in the console: requiem_01 requiem_02 requiem_03 requiem_04 requiem_05 [h1]Optio

item.title: [ Mod ] UI Graphics Complete Fix
item.description:
View ArticleSteam Workshop
Media
Media gallery
1 / 5
After years of dealing with incorrect UI, you can finally make your game look more coherent! Alternate file sources: Steam Workshop
item.content:encoded:
View ArticleSteam Workshop
Media
Media gallery
1 / 5
After years of dealing with incorrect UI, you can finally make your game look more coherent! Alternate file sources: Steam Workshop

item.title: [ Mod ] Enhanced Weapons for UI Graphics Complete Fix
item.description:
View ArticleSteam WorkshopSteam Workshop 2
Media
Media gallery
1 / 1
A little consistency add-on for UI Graphics Complete Fix to match Definitive Vanilla Fixes & Improvements . Includes: • Slightly Revised Pistols (HUD icon) • Slightly Adjusted XM1014 (HUD icon and tip graphic) • Tweaked TLS M16 (Tip graphic) Alternate file sources: Steam Workshop
item.content:encoded:
View ArticleSteam WorkshopSteam Workshop 2
Media
Media gallery
1 / 1
A little consistency add-on for UI Graphics Complete Fix to match Definitive Vanilla Fixes & Improvements . Includes: • Slightly Revised Pistols (HUD icon) • Slightly Adjusted XM1014 (HUD icon and tip graphic) • Tweaked TLS M16 (Tip graphic) Alternate file sources: Steam Workshop

item.title: [ 5 Maps ] Dark Carnival: Remix
item.description:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Dark Carnival: Remix is a redesign of Dark Carnival that remakes the layout and adds new areas and events in Whispering Oaks to explore. Beta content has also been brought to life and restored. See the Tunnel of Love with flowing water, the towering Ferris Wheel spinning around, and the explosive Concert finale as it was originally intended. Players in Versus Mode will also have access to new mechanics to create more competitively viable experience. Finally , there's a secret ending cutscene that bridges the gap between Dark Carnival and Swamp Fever if you can find all five secret coins (one on each map)! Version 2.0 is now out! Containing a brand new redesign of Map 1 (The Motel), revamps and new areas added to other maps, balance changes for Versus and Coop, and a huge amount of new polish. Please see the changelog for the full list of changes! Credits: Level Design: Valve, NF Models: Roku, SpeedBoost Textures: Henrietta, Eranthis, Gyroic Scripts: Daroot Leafstorm, Cuba Testers: Olde, Jacob, Sir, Roku, Epilimic, MrFunreal
item.content:encoded:
View Article
Media
Media gallery
1 / 8
Dark Carnival: Remix is a redesign of Dark Carnival that remakes the layout and adds new areas and events in Whispering Oaks to explore. Beta content has also been brought to life and restored. See the Tunnel of Love with flowing water, the towering Ferris Wheel spinning around, and the explosive Concert finale as it was originally intended. Players in Versus Mode will also have access to new mechanics to create more competitively viable experience. Finally , there's a secret ending cutscene that bridges the gap between Dark Carnival and Swamp Fever if you can find all five secret coins (one on each map)! Version 2.0 is now out! Containing a brand new redesign of Map 1 (The Motel), revamps and new areas added to other maps, balance changes for Versus and Coop, and a huge amount of new polish. Please see the changelog for the full list of changes! Credits: Level Design: Valve, NF Models: Roku, SpeedBoost Textures: Henrietta, Eranthis, Gyroic Scripts: Daroot Leafstorm, Cuba Testers: Olde, Jacob, Sir, Roku, Epilimic, MrFunreal
